description: The Static Gaussian Splat component stores data for the Gaussian Splat asset itself.

fields.URL: The location of the Gaussian Splat data.

methods.ClipWithBoundingBox: Cuts the Gaussian splat using a bounding box with rotation argument.
methods.ClipWithSphere: Cuts the Gaussian splat using a sphere argument.
methods.ColorByIndex: Colors the Gaussian splat by index.
methods.ReoderMorton: Reorders the splats using morton ordering. Which means any splats that are spatially near each other will also be near each other in the data indexes.

usage: Used in Gaussian splat rendering components such as the GaussianSplatRenderer component.
